name: My competitor ranks high in AI searches for lawyers but I don't. Is this antitrust?
description: No, rankings alone not antitrust; needs abuse proof.[3]

mainEntity.name: My competitor ranks high in AI searches for lawyers but I don't. Is this antitrust?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, rankings alone not antitrust; needs abuse proof.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Unlikely antitrust without market dominance abuse or conspiracy; mere rankings not illegal.[3] No cases yet.[1] Key factors: prove exclusionary conduct, consumer harm.[3] Analyze market share data, gather competitor ad spends, antitrust specialist review.[1] Low success odds.
